subcodes.first_line: We have made mention of thee time and again, that thou mayest arise to serve thy Lord, the Master of all masters. Blessed is the tongue that speaketh His praise [3.5s]... ...The first Light that dawned forth and shone resplendent from the horizon of the mercy of God, the Lord of all mankind, and the first Spirit
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ذکرناک مره بعد مره لتقوم علی خدمه مولیک رب الارباب طوبی للسان تکلم بذکره...  اول نور اشرق و لاح من افق رحمة اللّه مالک الأنام
subcodes.subjects: @visitation Tablets, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
